block_02: We hereby confirm receipt of your request to DELETE your account and ALL your personal data in accordance to your rights under Article 17 of GDPR. Please note that your personal information is very important to us and {{embedded.brand_name}} takes data protection very seriously.
block_03: We will gladly take action on your request to have your personal data deleted, where your request is valid and is in accordance to applicable laws and regulations.
block_04: We will process your request and provide you with a final response within thirty (30) working days.
block_05: Our systems are generally configured to adhere to the necessity and data minimization principle. Meaning that {{embedded.brand_name}} does not process any personal data from you which are not absolutely necessary for providing our services to you.
block_06: If you wish to CANCEL your request, you are able to do so through our website during the time your request is under process. Processing of your request may take from 1 to 30 business days depending on the volume of requests that are currently being processed by our systems.
block_07: Effects of canceling your request to delete:
block_08: Your account will not be deleted;
block_09: You will be able to access your account, trade and make use of {{embedded.brand_name}} services; and
block_10: Your personal data will not be deleted.
block_12: If you have any questions you can contact us at
